expertises.name: Animal Care
expertises.description: Knowledge in caring for and managing animals, including feeding, grooming, and basic medical care.

expertises.name: Breastplate
expertises.description: Specialized proficiency with breastplates and similar torso armor. Granted by talents like Iron Will.

expertises.name: Culinary Arts
expertises.description: Knowledge in preparing, cooking, and presenting food. Includes understanding of ingredients, techniques, and kitchen safety.

expertises.name: Engineering
expertises.description: Knowledge in designing, building, and maintaining mechanical systems and devices.

expertises.name: High Society
expertises.description: Knowledge in navigating social hierarchies, etiquette, and influential networks.

expertises.name: History
expertises.description: Knowledge in historical events, cultures, and significant figures.

expertises.name: Improvised Weapons
expertises.description: Specialized proficiency with improvised weapons. Granted by talents like Improvised Combat.

expertises.name: Knives
expertises.description: Specialized proficiency with knives and similar bladed tools. Granted by talents like Killing Edge.

expertises.name: Leather Armor
expertises.description: Specialized proficiency with leather armor. Granted by talents like Leather Mastery.

expertises.name: Military Strategy
expertises.description: Knowledge in planning and executing military operations, including tactics, logistics, and leadership.

expertises.name: Religion
expertises.description: Knowledge in various religious beliefs, practices, and institutions.

expertises.name: Riding Horses
expertises.description: Knowledge in riding and managing horses, including basic care and training.

expertises.name: Shortbow
expertises.description: Specialized proficiency with shortbows and similar ranged weapons. Granted by talents like Archery Mastery.

expertises.name: Shortspear
expertises.description: Specialized proficiency with shortspears and similar polearms. Granted by talents like Polearm Mastery.

expertises.name: Sidesword
expertises.description: Specialized proficiency with sideswords and similar one-handed swords. Granted by talents like Sword Mastery.

expertises.name: Unarmed Attacks
expertises.description: Specialized proficiency with unarmed combat techniques. Granted by talents like Martial Arts Mastery.

expertises.name: Underworld
expertises.description: Knowledge in navigating and understanding the criminal underworld, including its networks, operations, and key figures.

expertises.name: Visual Arts
expertises.description: Knowledge in visual arts, including painting, drawing, sculpture, and other forms of artistic expression.

expertises.name: Fabrial Operation
expertises.description: Knowledge in operating and repairing common fabrials used for everyday tasks and combat support.
